overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a futuristic industrial district at night during heavy rain. The player navigates through covered highways and open industrial zones with neon-lit structures, experiencing varying speeds from 15 to 100 km/h while maneuvering around obstacles and receiving a collision warning.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial expressway with massive metal roof structure

events.description: vehicle decelerates rapidly from 100 km/h to 11 km/h preparing for left turn exit
exits the covered highway structure into open industrial area

agents.ego_description: accelerating through covered industrial highway then braking hard for exit maneuver

entered.detail: large industrial truss roof covering the entire highway with metal support beams
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead roof structure
rows of bright floodlights mounted to the ceiling structure
curved ramp leading out of the covered highway system

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed under a massive industrial roof structure with heavy rain visible beyond the shelter. The vehicle accelerates along the wet asphalt before braking hard to navigate the exit ramp, transitioning from the enclosed highway to the open industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with perimeter fencing and distant warehouses

events.description: exits covered highway into open industrial yard with visible sky and rain
accelerates to 76 km/h after completing the left turn navigation
hard braking from 91 km/h to 17 km/h for upcoming corner

agents.ego_description: navigating left turn through industrial gate area, varying speed through open yard

entered.detail: metal perimeter fencing with concrete posts marking industrial boundary
heavy concrete dividers lining the edge of the industrial road
large industrial warehouse structures silhouetted against the night sky
industrial gate entrance with overhead beam and lighting
tall light towers illuminating the industrial yard

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered highway into an open industrial yard exposed to heavy rain. The vehicle completes a left turn past concrete barriers and chain-link fencing, accelerating through the open area toward distant warehouse buildings before braking hard for the next navigation point.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor between high warehouse walls

events.description: enters narrow industrial alley between high concrete walls and scaffolding
accelerates through the corridor after navigating tight section

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through narrow industrial passage with close walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall concrete warehouse wall with vertical strip lighting illuminating the surface
industrial scaffolding and support frameworks along the left side
large diameter pipes running along the left wall
elevated metal walkway or conveyor structure spanning across the road
industrial loading bay with raised platform visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Navigating a narrow industrial service corridor with high concrete walls pressing close on both sides. The vehicle passes illuminated warehouse facades and industrial piping, accelerating through the confined space toward the loading dock area visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial storage yard with silos and elevated conveyors

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open industrial yard with storage silos
collision warning system activates with red triangular indicators on windshield
emergency braking from 82 km/h to 25 km/h to avoid obstacle

agents.ego_description: high speed driving through open industrial area, emergency braking for obstacle, then accelerating to exit

entered.detail: large cylindrical storage tanks and silos dominating the background
long elevated structure with covered conveyor belt spanning the yard
wide open storage area with scattered industrial equipment
large industrial building at the far end of the yard
electrical boxes and utility equipment along the right side

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed through an open industrial storage yard with massive silos and elevated conveyor bridges visible in the distance. The collision warning system suddenly activates, prompting emergency braking to avoid an obstacle on the wet road, followed by rapid acceleration toward the final warehouse structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive through a rain-slicked industrial district, transitioning from an enclosed highway into a series of open yards and narrow corridors. It begins under a massive industrial roof where the vehicle accelerates along wet asphalt before braking hard to navigate an exit ramp. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into an expansive industrial yard exposed to heavy rain, moving past concrete barriers and chain-link fencing toward distant warehouses. The environment then shifts into a confined service corridor with high concrete walls and illuminated piping before expanding once more into a storage yard filled with massive silos and elevated conveyor bridges. Finally, the vehicle undergoes emergency braking as a collision warning activates on the wet road, followed by a rapid burst of acceleration toward a final warehouse structure.
